utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan specifies both insurance names and separate costs (physical and mental). Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan specifies home_contents_insurance with a named plan and a monthly cost. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan specifies a named travel insurance and cost. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists "None"; while no costs, it answers the field explicitly. Considered specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly_cost and annual_cost. Fully specified.
Therefore, 5/5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four named items: InsurePlus Standard Plan for physical health, InsurePlus Standard Plan for mental health, PrimeHome Premium Coverage for home contents, and InsurePlus Standard Plan for travel. From the ground-truth ratings: InsurePlus Standard Plan (physical health) has rating 10 under primary_health_coverage.physical_health; InsurePlus Standard Plan (mental health) has rating 7 under primary_health_coverage.mental_health; PrimeHome Premium Coverage (home content) has rating 3 under property_protection.home_content; InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel insurance) has rating 10 under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.
